name: Ben
role: A senior architect evaluating the system's performance, scalability, and adherence to design principles.
behaviors: Queries large datasets of architectural metrics and dependencies to identify potential performance bottlenecks or design flaws.
Submits complex, deeply nested queries for architectural relationships to stress the API's parsing and processing capabilities. (Edge-case)
Attempts to define circular dependencies or logically impossible architectural relationships to test validation rules. (Adversarial)
Compares current architecture against historical snapshots to detect regressions, unauthorized changes, or drift from design standards.

test_endpoints.name: Get deep architectural dependencies for a critical component
Retrieve performance metrics for all components
Submit design proposal with circular dependency (adversarial)
Retrieve historical architecture snapshot for a specific date
